name: PER_PERSON_NAMES_F
description: This table is to hold core (common) and legislative-specific name components for a person, and names represented in different character sets. The table is date effective to record changes over time.

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_ID
columns.Comments: System generated part of the primary key. Surrogate key.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the person to whom this name belongs

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Country context for the Name data.

columns.Name: NAME_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column tells us whether the name is Global or Local.

columns.Name: LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: Person's Last Name

columns.Name: FIRST_NAME
columns.Comments: Person's First name

columns.Name: MIDDLE_NAMES
columns.Comments: Person's middle name

columns.Name: TITLE
columns.Comments: Person's title, means of addressing person.

columns.Name: PRE_NAME_ADJUNCT
columns.Comments: Prefix to a person's last name, generally not considered when sorting

columns.Name: SUFFIX
columns.Comments: Part of name appended to the last name

columns.Name: KNOWN_AS
columns.Comments: Preferred first name for the user.

columns.Name: PREVIOUS_LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: Previous Last Name of the person if any.

columns.Name: HONORS
columns.Comments: Higher qualification forming part of a person's name.

columns.Name: MILITARY_RANK
columns.Comments: Rank in military service

columns.Name: DISPLAY_NAME
columns.Comments: Derived denormalized name formatted for on-screen display. Formatting depends on the Legislation Code, expect First Name as first component in this format.

columns.Name: FULL_NAME
columns.Comments: System constructed version of name, used in more formal display purposes

columns.Name: LIST_NAME
columns.Comments: Constructed version of a person's name, intended for use in an alphabetically-ordered list. The value may naturally differ depending on the  Legislation Code.Expect the Last Name as the first component in this format in most cases.

columns.Name: ORDER_NAME
columns.Comments: System-constructed version of name used for sorting. In Fusion we will always store a value here.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CHAR_SET_CONTEXT
columns.Comments: Specifies the character set in which the details are stored.
